log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Grung — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Grung — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Grung — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Grung — Bardic Musician HP: 46/67
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Grung — Bardic Musician HP: 30/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Grung — Bardic Musician HP: 13/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Grung — Bardic Musician --- HP: 13/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (13/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Grung — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Grung — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Grung — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Grung — Bardic Musician HP: -4/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
